items.name: ac_client_user_id
items.purpose: Stores current user ID from Analytics Cloud.

items.name: ac_client_identity
items.purpose: Stores the logged-in user ID as a SHA-256 cryptographic hash generated using the email and userId.

items.name: ac_client_channel_id
items.purpose: Stores the Channel ID of the current website.

items.name: ac_message_queue_identity
items.purpose: Stores identities that have not been sent to the server; can be an empty array or a queue of identities.

items.name: ac_client_storage_version
items.purpose: Stores the current internal storage settings version.

items.name: ac_client_context
items.purpose: Stores user and page-level properties, providing context for event submissions to the server.

items.name: ac_client_batch
items.purpose: Stores a list of IDs to avoid sending duplicate events to the backend.

items.name: ac_message_queue
items.purpose: Stores events that have not been sent to the server; can be an empty array or an event queue.

items.name: ac_client_previous_email_address_hash
items.purpose: Stores the email ID of the logged in user as a SHA-256 cryptographic hash; used for session continuity and anonymous event attribution.

items.name: _hjSessionUser
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar when a user first lands on a page.

items.name: _hjIncludedInPageviewSample
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar for the online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: _hjSession
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar to store current session data.

items.name: _hjFirstSeen
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar to identify a new user's first session.

items.name: _hjIncludedInSessionSample
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar for the online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: _hjAbsoluteSessionInProgress
items.purpose: Generated by Hotjar for the online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: __zlcmid
items.purpose: Generated by Zendesk to identify a user's session.
